input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.3
            TITLE: initial inspection

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.3: INITIAL INSPECTION
IN.3 INITIAL INSPECTION 
Bring these to Initial Inspection: 
• Technical Inspection Form 
• All Driver Equipment per VE.3 to be used by each driver  
• Fire Extinguishers (for paddock and vehicle)  VE.2.3 
• Wet Tires  V.4.3.2

final_answer: INITIAL INSPECTION Bring these to Initial Inspection: • Technical Inspection Form • All Driver Equipment per VE.3 to be used by each driver • Fire Extinguishers (for paddock and vehicle) VE.2.3 • Wet Tires V.4.3.2
